name: Turnip and Lentil Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the red lentils until tender and all the water is absorbed.
2. Preheat the oven to Gas 6, 200°C, 400°F.
3. Mix the cooked lentils, grated turnip, and breadcrumbs together in a shallow casserole dish.
4. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
5. Level the top of the mixture.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes until the top is lightly browned.
Serve with steamed vegetables. Delicious!
